{{- /* Give every Markdown table the theme's .table styling inside a scrollable, bordered .table-responsive wrapper, so rows and columns have visible dividers and wide tables scroll instead of overflowing on narrow screens. */ -}}
{{- range .THead }} {{- range . }} {{ .Text }} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- range .TBody }} {{- range . }} {{ .Text }} {{- end }} {{- end }}
